message:
feat(cx): add Cx propagation/cancellation unit tests and emit cx.propagate tracing spans (bd-ehk.6)

Implement the full test suite for Cx context propagation and cancellation
behavior required by bd-ehk.6, proving that Cx correctly threads through
Widget render, Update, and Subscription phases.

Changes to crates/ftui-core/src/cx.rs:
- Cx::check() now emits a cx.propagate info_span with cx_id, deadline_remaining_us,
  and cx_cancelled fields, matching the tracing contract in the bead spec
- Cancellation within check() emits a WARN event with cx_id and deadline info
- Deadline checks use the computed remaining_us directly instead of re-calling is_expired()
- Add test helpers: TestModel, RenderStrategy, MissingCxError, update_with_cx,
  render_widget_with_cx_atomic, subscription_send_with_cx, choose_render_strategy
- Add test: cx_propagates_across_update_render_and_subscription_phases — verifies
  Cx flows through all three lifecycle phases with correct state propagation
- Add test: cancellation_mid_render_aborts_without_partial_output — proves atomic
  render semantics (scratch buffer pattern prevents partial output on cancel)
- Add test: deadline_enforcement_triggers_strategy_downgrade — verifies render
  strategy degrades when remaining deadline drops below threshold
- Add test: missing_cx_returns_clear_runtime_error — confirms clear error for None Cx
- Add test (tracing-json feature): check_emits_cx_propagate_span_and_warns_on_cancellation
  — captures tracing spans/events and asserts cx.propagate span and WARN on cancellation
- Close bd-ehk.6 in beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
